creator: fdwargee6@gmail.com
text:
The security/yersinia package is totally outdated.

Current version is 0.8.2 (released on August 2017) with a LOT of bugfixes  including security ones.

The owner URL also changed to https://github.com/tomac/yersinia

I'd recommend upgrading this package from the GitHub master branch because it contains some commits not included in the 0.8.2 version and they references the FreeBSD platform specifically.

IMHO it's a pity getting an outdated version of such a tool (valuable for some pentesters and networking admins)

Just FYI, the current master branch compiled and worked successfully on a FreeBSD 11.1 machine.

Regards
